improvements.prompt_change: Require defensive telemetry behavior: observability failures must be non-blocking unless explicitly stated.
improvements.rationale: Prevents successful function runs from failing when telemetry backends are transiently unavailable.

improvements.prompt_change: Explicitly require at least one negative-path test beyond validation failure for 'not emitted on failed runs' acceptance criteria.
improvements.rationale: Improves coverage of non-validation failure paths (upstream fetch or blob write failures).

improvements.prompt_change: When acceptance criteria include telemetry visibility/SLA, require a deploy-time integration verification step with a concrete KQL query and execution window.
improvements.rationale: Unit tests cannot prove ingestion latency; explicit ops verification prevents criterion gaps.
